import {VirtualTree, TreeController} from "virtual-tree.js"; import {fs} from "@sys"; import {drives} from "@env"; function cmp(a,b) { if(a.isdir && !b.isdir) return -1; if(b.isdir && !a.isdir) return 1; return a.name.localeCompare(b.name); } function pathOf(item) { return item.parent ? (item.parent + "/" + item.name) : item.name; } class FolderController extends TreeController { rootFolder; constructor(rootPath) { super(); this.rootFolder = rootPath; } keyOf(item) { return item.name; } textOf(item) { return [, item.name ]; } // may return VDOM isNode(item) { return item.type & fs.UV_DIRENT_DIR; } kidsOf(item) { const path = pathOf(item); const r = fs.sync.readdir(path); r.forEach(entry => { entry.parent = path; entry.isdir = (entry.type & fs.UV_DIRENT_DIR) != 0 }); r.sort(cmp); return r; } get roots() { const path = this.rootFolder; let r = []; r = path ? fs.sync.readdir(path) : drives(); r.forEach(entry => { entry.parent = path; entry.isdir = (entry.type & fs.UV_DIRENT_DIR) != 0 }); r.sort(cmp); return r; } } const fsController = new FolderController( "" /*URL.toPath(__DIR__ + "../..")*/); document.body.append();
